description: Configure an automated map generation layout (Atlas) for Brazil using the countries layer from /home/ga/GIS_Data/natural_earth/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp. Create a Print Layout named 'Country_Report' with an Atlas enabled and filtered for Brazil ("NAME" = 'Brazil'). The map item must be configured to be controlled by the Atlas to zoom to the feature. Export the resulting map to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/brazil_atlas_map.pdf and save the project to /home/ga/GIS_Data/projects/atlas_project.qgz.
